dimensions.name: Runnability
dimensions.evidence: franka_controller.py single entry point, pip install -r requirements.txt, MuJoCo support

dimensions.name: MuJoCo Depth
dimensions.evidence: 2 × Franka Panda (7-DOF), 4 touch sensors, position actuators (kp=4500/3500/2000)

dimensions.name: Task Design
dimensions.evidence: 3 space modules, dual-arm assembly, 50mm perturbation, fault recovery

dimensions.name: Control
dimensions.evidence: UAHP protocol, closed-loop force control, 94.6% fault recovery

dimensions.name: Dual-Arm Coordination
dimensions.evidence: 2 arms coordinated, collision avoidance, handoff protocol

dimensions.name: Engineering Quality
dimensions.evidence: 1500+ lines controller, 80 tests, physics audit, benchmark script

dimensions.name: Presentation
dimensions.evidence: 20s demo video (1080p), EVALUATION_GUIDE.md, JUDGE_BRIEF.md, HUD overlay

dimensions.name: Innovation
dimensions.evidence: UAHP protocol, real-time uncertainty estimation, 94.6% recovery
